Header.name: Mr. Bandar Fayez Saeed Hassanin
Header.title: Hajj, Umrah & Tourism Hospitality Services Management

Profile.summary:
An experienced expert and leader in the management of Hajj, Umrah, and tourism hospitality services, and an early retiree from the Saudi Electricity Company after a successful career path. I possess over a quarter-century of experience in operational management and field services for the guests of Allah from various countries worldwide, including Algeria, Oman, Egypt, Sudan, Chad, Mauritania, Djibouti, and the Comoros.

I hold a Diploma in Hajj and Umrah Services Management, with a massive record of advanced training courses in strategic planning, conflict management, guest experience, and effective communication. To enhance the quality of services provided, I rely on multi-cultural communication skills supported by my proficiency in several languages, including Urdu.

I combine institutional precision with the spirit of authentic hospitality, always striving to transform field challenges into exceptional experiences and complete customer satisfaction, which has been crowned with dozens of local and international certificates of appreciation.
